description: React with ✅ to a GitHub-email digest in Slack and this agent archives those Gmail messages — the Slack-native approval gate for github-email-digest.

EMOJI.description: Emoji whose reaction approves archiving (no colons).

GMAIL_ACCOUNT.description: Gmail account segment under the Gmail VFS root.

GMAIL_VFS_ROOT.description: Where the Gmail provider is mounted (connect registry: /google-mail).

DRY_RUN.description: Set "true" to detect + reply but never write the archive.
